data.name: S.E.X. Z.O.N.E. ☢️
data.detailed_description:
Dive into the world where the dangerous lands near the Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant are waiting to be explored.

A group of hot girls finds a shelter in your bunker - you’ll have to go out into the agressive wasteland to gather vital resources, collect artifacts, and uncover the mysteries within the Zone.

Successful outings strengthen your relationships, bringing you closer to rewards you won’t soon forget. Your ultimate goal? Track down the rarest artifact rumored to possess a power that makes every girl irresistibly drawn to you.

Your goal lies deep within the heart of the Zone, protected by mutants, anomalies, and radiation. To claim it, you’ll need to navigate the treacherous landscape, manage resources, and make strategic decisions.

In the Zone, each day is a challenge. Leave the safety of the bunker to scavenge for essentials like food and water, evade deadly anomalies, and hunt down the rare items needed by the girls back at base.

Grow your strength and customize skills to improve odds on each trip, and use your wits to survive long enough to collect what you need. Will you emerge as the ultimate stalker, earning the loyalty of the girls and surviving the Zone’s dangers? Dive into the game and find out!


Features:
  • Steamy adult content 💦 – unlock rewarding scenes as you build trust with the girls.
  • Survival in the Zone ☢ – search for resources and navigate a haunting landscape, fully inspired by Chernobyl’s eerie atmosphere.
  • Intense exploration 🗺 – explore dangerous locations, dodge anomalies, and uncover the Zone's secrets.
  • Character progression 🔀 – make important decisions, manage resources, and make sure everyone’s survival needs are met.
  • Immersive environments 🌟 – Detailed 3D graphics and animations bring S.E.X. Z.O.N.E. to life, from the desolate outdoors to your interactions in the bunker.

data.short_description: Welcome to S.E.X. Z.O.N.E. ☢️, where the perilous lands near Chernobyl await! Protect a group of hot girls in your bunker, explore the irradiated Zone, gather rare artifacts, and unlock unforgettable rewards in our new adult game!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Vietnamese, Greek, Danish, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Norwegian, Dutch, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Romanian, Thai, Turkish, Hungarian, Ukrainian, Finnish, Czech, Swedish, Japanese, Indonesian, Spanish - Latin America

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 or above
  • Processor: Intel or AMD
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Direct X compatible
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
